business.name: Kayes Plumbing & Heating
business.tagline: Reliable Plumbing & Heating You Can Trust

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Kaye was brilliant — arrived on time, diagnosed the boiler fault quickly and had it fixed the same day. Very reasonably priced and tidy worker. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: Used Kayes Plumbing & Heating for a full central heating upgrade. Professional job from start to finish, great communication throughout. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: Linda R
sample_reviews.text: Called out for an emergency leak late in the afternoon and Kaye was with us within the hour. Friendly, efficient and honest pricing. Couldn't ask for more.

brand.usp: A trusted, Gas Safe registered plumber based in Cookridge, Leeds, delivering honest, high-quality plumbing and heating solutions with a personal touch. No call centres — just reliable, local service when you need it most.
brand.hero_headline: Your Local Leeds Plumber & Heating Expert
brand.about_paragraph: I'm Kaye, a Gas Safe registered plumber and heating engineer based in Cookridge, Leeds. I've built my reputation on turning up on time, being straight with customers, and getting the job done right first time. Whether it's a leaky tap, a new boiler, or a full heating system, I bring the same care and attention to every home I work in.
